summary: Backend testing for Weekly Events + Event Attendance + Seasons + Believer + Tasks. All 30 pytest cases passed (100% success). Verified: 3 seeded weekly events with weekday_name; RBAC on weekly-events/seasons/tasks admin ops; 8AM IST lock behavior (past date -> 403 'locked'); upsert on (user,event,date); 422 on invalid status; season create date validation (end<start -> 400); my-report shape and attendance_pct = present/(present+absent)*100; Believer-only season includes ONLY Tuesday (weekday=1); regular season includes Tue/Thu/Sat; team-report requires team_leader/super_admin and is sorted by attendance_pct desc; PATCH believer flag toggles is_believer; tasks default returns own, all_users=true admin-only; task complete awards XP, second call 400, non-assignee 403; delete task admin-only.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1790 lines; consider splitting into routers (attendance, seasons, tasks, admin) for maintainability (>700 line rule).
list_tasks enrichment lacks null-check pattern for missing user_id (line ~1555); currently guarded, fine — no action.
_compute_report does per-day nested awaits (O(days * events * DB round-trips)); acceptable now but consider a single aggregation for larger seasons.
Auto season assignment $or filter allows regular season to match believer events; ambiguous but not incorrect for current tests.
seed_data_creation: Test creates several TEST_-prefixed seasons and one TEST_Task; seasons are cleaned up in test_delete_requires_super_admin. Task deleted at end. is_believer flag toggled on member but reset to false.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly attendance backend fully verified via /app/backend/tests/test_weekly_attendance.py (30 tests, all passing). Frontend NOT tested per request. Seeded weekly events (Tue/Thu/Sat) present. Lock cutoff = 8AM IST — use GET /event-attendance/week to find unlocked occurrences before marking. Believer seasons filter events to weekday=1 only.
